mapper.select: SELECT EMP_ID, DEPT_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, EMP_NAME, ROLE_CODE, STATUS FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
SELECT EMP_ID, DEPT_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, EMP_NAME, ROLE_CODE, STATUS FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMPLOYEE (EMP_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, EMP_NAME, DEPT_ID, PHONE, EMAIL, ROLE_CODE , STATUS) VALUES (EMP_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{dto.loginId}, #{encodedPassword}, #{dto.empName}, #{dto.deptId}, #{dto.phone}, #{dto.email}, 'EMPLOYEE', 'PENDING')
